creator: ws@au.dyndns.ws
text:
From-To:	open->closed
By:	linimon
When:	Tue Mar 12 06:30:49 UTC 2013
Why:	Superseded by ports/170078.


I believe this should have been done the other way around. This PR
(176838) provides a later version than 170078 (5.2.47 vs 5.2.40) and
170078 requires fixes to a patch file and dependencies to support
5.2.47.

Attached is a shar updating andy's 2nd shar in this PR with the
following changes:

 - drop the PORTREVISION (not needed since not yet committed)
 - add USE_PYTHON to satisfy a dependency on python


It would be nice to get this in since the current
databases/mysql-workbench52 is rather deficient now.

-- 

Wayne
